name: HRQ_QSTN_ANSWERS_VL
query: SELECT B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.QSTN_ANSWER_ID, B.QUESTION_ID, B.QSTN_VERSION_NUM, L.SHORT_TEXT, L.LONG_TEXT, B.SEQ_NUM, B.CORRECT_FLAG, B.SCORE_WEIGHT, B.MODULE_ID, B.RATING_LEVEL_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.SCORE, B.ADDL_QSTNR_ID, B.ADDL_QSTNR_VERSION_NUM, L.RESPONSE_FEEDBACK, B.ANSWER_CODE FROM HRQ_QSTN_ANSWERS_B B, HRQ_QSTN_ANSWERS_TL L WHERE B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = L.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND B.QSTN_ANSWER_ID = L.QSTN_ANSWER_ID AND L.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
